creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

Update from 2.13.4 to 2.13.7:

diff -r -u databases/cego/Makefile /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/Makefile
--- databases/cego/Makefile	2012-07-16 23:30:25.622212975 +0200
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/Makefile	2012-08-06 04:47:48.720781612 +0200
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/databases/cego/Makefile,v 1.47 2012/07/16 06:53:35 araujo Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	cego
-PORTVERSION=	2.13.4
+PORTVERSION=	2.13.7
 CATEGORIES=	databases
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.lemke-it.com/
 
diff -r -u databases/cego/distinfo /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/distinfo
--- databases/cego/distinfo	2012-07-16 23:30:25.643544178 +0200
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/distinfo	2012-08-06 04:48:02.202602346 +0200
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (cego-2.13.4.tar.gz) = 14c7f85e51a113e03d63463905c70ec185850586d0d6725df13bdb5fae5d1e66
-SIZE (cego-2.13.4.tar.gz) = 610123
+SHA256 (cego-2.13.7.tar.gz) = 9f8afa59cb72c83a8927d2a10ffd75d79d801317a2b1c49902aca082f3668444
+SIZE (cego-2.13.7.tar.gz) = 656509
